'''''Luxury''-class shuttles''' were civilian passenger shuttles derived from the military [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. Many such shuttles were employed by [[Tinta Lines]]. They were equipped with the [[Astronav P127 Course Plotter]] and [[Chempat Engineered Defenses|Chepat]] [[Supreme Defender]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]]. ''[[Tinta Blue Seven]]'' was one such shuttle.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
